understanding.goal_understanding: The goal of the game is to progress through all levels of the KA59 puzzle by placing every selectable piece onto a corresponding goal tile marked '+', such that all goals are simultaneously occupied by selectable pieces to achieve a WIN condition for each level and complete the entire game.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement actions (MOVE_LEFT/RIGHT/UP/DOWN) shift the currently selected piece (P) in the specified direction by 3 pixels (one cell), potentially pushing adjacent pushable blocks (B) if possible, but are blocked by walls (#) or boundaries; CLICK switches selection to another selectable piece (S) at the exact target_position coordinates, without moving it; positions are pixel-based [x,y] with x rightward and y downward; multiple selectables require switching via CLICK to maneuver each one independently to goals, and heuristic hints like movement.blocked provide clues but actions must be tested for exact behavior.
